news.excerpt_en: The Gothic expansion brings vampires, werewolves, and dark magic to Sorcery: Contested Realm.
news.summary_pt: A expansao Gothic traz vampiros, lobisomens e magia sombria para Sorcery: Contested Realm.

news.excerpt_en: The Gothic expansion brings vampires, werewolves, and dark magic to Sorcery.
news.summary_pt: A expansão Gótica traz vampiros, lobisomens e magia sombria para Sorcery.

news.excerpt_en: Four tiers of competition for all players: Gothic Store Kits, Cornerstone Championships, Grand Contests, and Avatar of the Realm.
news.summary_pt: Quatro niveis de competicao: Gothic Store Kits, Cornerstone Championships, Grand Contests e Avatar of the Realm.

news.title_en: Welcome to Sorcery, Pedro G. Ferreira!
news.title_pt: Bem-vindo ao Sorcery, Pedro G. Ferreira!
news.excerpt_en: Traditional illustrator from Porto, Portugal joins the Sorcery artist roster with stunning Gothic artwork.
news.summary_pt: Ilustrador tradicional de Porto, Portugal, se junta ao time de artistas do Sorcery com arte gotica impressionante.

news.excerpt_en: Due to high demand, a Beta Unlimited reprint is scheduled for Q2 2025.
news.summary_pt: Devido a alta demanda, uma reimpressao do Beta Unlimited esta programada para Q2 2025.

news.excerpt_en: The official deckbuilder receives new features including collection tracking and improved search.
news.summary_pt: O deckbuilder oficial recebe novos recursos incluindo rastreamento de colecao e busca aprimorada.
